goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'polish' food and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves 'chinese' food.
Make sure you get 'address'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 19:45' and should go to 'london kings cross'.
The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID', 'travel time', and 'departure time'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve polish food and should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 19:45 and should go to london kings cross
The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID, travel time, and departure time
